title: Creating Albums
drDigitalIntro: Albums organize your photos by topic. Create an album for a vacation, a holiday, or people. Drag photos into an album to organize them. Albums don't move the actual photos — they're just folders that group photos. You can have photos in multiple albums. Albums are great for creating collections to share with family or print.

playgroundTask.question: What happens to the original photo when you add it to an album?

options.text: It moves into the album and is only there
A copy is created in the album
Nothing — the album is just a shortcut to the original
It gets compressed to save space

drDigitalSuccess: Albums are just organizational labels — the original photo stays in your library, and the album is a view of it.
drDigitalHint: Albums are like playlists for photos. Adding a song to a playlist doesn't move the audio file.
